supply_list.source_quote: Use the standard intake form and ensure all fields are completed.

supply_list.display_name: tissues, water cup, blanket, and pillow
supply_list.source_quote: Provide the patient with a comfort kit containing tissues, water cup, blanket, and pillow.

predicates.threshold_expression: If the patient reports chest pain, immediately escalate to emergency protocol.
predicates.source_quote: If the patient reports chest pain, immediately escalate to emergency protocol.

predicates.threshold_expression: If the patient reports mild headache, proceed to standard assessment.
predicates.source_quote: If the patient reports mild headache, proceed to standard assessment.

predicates.threshold_expression: If the patient has a known allergy to penicillin, flag the chart accordingly.
predicates.human_label: the patient has a known allergy to penicillin
predicates.source_quote: If the patient has a known allergy to penicillin, flag the chart accordingly.

predicates.threshold_expression: If pain level is greater than 7, administer analgesic per standing order.
predicates.source_quote: If pain level is greater than 7, administer analgesic per standing order.

predicates.threshold_expression: If pain level is between 4 and 6, offer over-the-counter options.
predicates.source_quote: If pain level is between 4 and 6, offer over-the-counter options.

predicates.threshold_expression: If pain level is less than 4, continue monitoring.
predicates.source_quote: If pain level is less than 4, continue monitoring.

predicates.threshold_expression: If the patient requires surgical intervention, refer to the surgical consent module.
predicates.source_quote: If the patient requires surgical intervention, refer to the surgical consent module.

predicates.threshold_expression: If the patient requires only medication management, proceed to the pharmacy coordination module.
predicates.human_label: the patient requires only medication management
predicates.source_quote: If the patient requires only medication management, proceed to the pharmacy coordination module.

predicates.threshold_expression: If the patient is over 65 years old and has multiple comorbidities, initiate the geriatric care coordination pathway.
predicates.human_label: the patient is over 65 years old and has multiple comorbidities
predicates.source_quote: If the patient is over 65 years old and has multiple comorbidities, initiate the geriatric care coordination pathway.

predicates.threshold_expression: If the patient is under 18, ensure guardian consent is obtained.
predicates.source_quote: If the patient is under 18, ensure guardian consent is obtained.

mod_initial_greeting.display_name: greeting the patient and confirming their identity

mod_patient_education.display_name: Explain the treatment options using language the patient can understand

rows.condition: select the appropriate care pathway based on acuity: emergent, urgent, or routine.
route the patient to the appropriate follow-up: primary care, specialist referral, or home health services.
rows.description: primary care, specialist referral, or home health services

phrase_bank.source_quote: If pain level is between 4 and 6, offer over-the-counter options.

phrase_bank.text: We recommend starting with a low dose and gradually increasing
phrase_bank.source_quote: such as 'We recommend starting with a low dose and gradually increasing'

phrase_bank.text: This procedure has a high success rate and minimal recovery time
phrase_bank.source_quote: or 'This procedure has a high success rate and minimal recovery time.'

rules.combine_rule: Document all findings in the electronic health record using standardized terminology.
rules.treatment_combination: Document all findings in the electronic health record using standardized terminology

rules.combine_rule: Integrate all assessment data, treatment decisions, and patient preferences into a comprehensive care summary.
rules.treatment_combination: Integrate all assessment data, treatment decisions, and patient preferences into a comprehensive care summary

rules.combine_rule: Ensure the patient verbally confirms understanding of their discharge instructions.
